revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23417362209|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Harvard_citation_documentation%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Harvard_citation_documentation%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Documentation subpage}}
<!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata -->
This template generates documentation for the Harv family of templates, varying the text based on the exact usage needed for the given template.  See {{What links here|Template:Harvard citation documentation|pages that transclude Template:Harvard citation documentation|all|extraparams=&hidelinks=1&hideredirs=1}}.

==Usage==
{{TemplateData header}}
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"1": {
			"description": "Name of the template",
			"example": "harvnb",
			"type": "string",
			"required": true
		},
		"noref": {
			"description": "Exclude surrounding the template usage with <ref> tags; this should be used on the sfn family of templates.",
			"example": "1",
			"type": "boolean"
		}
	},
	"description": "This template generates documentation for the Harv family of templates."
}
</templatedata>

<includeonly>{{sandbox other||
<!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata -->
}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Documentation shared content templates]]
[[Category:Documentation assistance templates]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Harvard_citation_documentation%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Documentation subpage}}

This template generates documentation for the Harv family of templates, varying the text based on the exact usage needed for the given template.  See {{What links here|Template:Harvard citation documentation|pages that transclude Template:Harvard citation documentation|all|extraparams=&hidelinks=1&hideredirs=1}}.

==Usage==
{{TemplateData header}}
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"1": {
			"description": "Name of the template",
			"example": "harvnb",
			"type": "string",
			"required": true
		},
		"noref": {
			"description": "Exclude surrounding the template usage with <ref> tags; this should be used on the sfn family of templates.",
			"example": "1",
			"type": "boolean"
		}
	},
	"description": "This template generates documentation for the Harv family of templates."
}
</templatedata>

<includeonly>{{sandbox other||

}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Documentation shared content templates]]
[[Category:Documentation assistance templates]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
